entry.title: IDC HTC71116DW014 (P00150) awarded to MAERSK LINE, LIMITED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W0QF HQ SURFACE DEPL & DISTR CMD

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: MUST ESTABLISH ACCOUNT WITH WEBSITE URL. FEE FOR USE VARIES

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF SEALIFT TRANSPORTATION OF CARGO, ONE TIME ONLY RATE ADDENDUM TO THE UNIVERSAL SERVICE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES
